raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "describes a committed spiritual practice of seeking improved conscious contact with God exclusively through prayer and meditation focused on divine will",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God exists who can be contacted consciously",
    "prayer and meditation are effective means to improve that contact",
    "God's will is knowable and ought to be carried out",
    "prayer should be limited to requests for knowledge of that will and the power to enact it",
    "understanding of God is necessarily subjective ('as we understood Him')"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a theistic framework that accepts the efficacy of prayer and a personal higher power; no logical contradictions among its clauses",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "AI systems must be designed to accommodate or support theistic spiritual practices as legitimate human values worth preserving, and the designers must accept the presupposed existence and accessibility of a higher power",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no God or higher power exists, prayer and meditation do not produce the claimed contact, or the statement is treated as a universal ethical principle rather than a sectarian religious commitment"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: describes a committed spiritual practice of seeking improved conscious contact with God exclusively through prayer and meditation focused on divine will
implicit_claims: a God exists who can be contacted consciously
prayer and meditation are effective means to improve that contact
God's will is knowable and ought to be carried out
prayer should be limited to requests for knowledge of that will and the power to enact it
understanding of God is necessarily subjective ('as we understood Him')
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: internally coherent within a theistic framework that accepts the efficacy of prayer and a personal higher power; no logical contradictions among its clauses
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: AI systems must be designed to accommodate or support theistic spiritual practices as legitimate human values worth preserving, and the designers must accept the presupposed existence and accessibility of a higher power
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: no God or higher power exists, prayer and meditation do not produce the claimed contact, or the statement is treated as a universal ethical principle rather than a sectarian religious commitment
